note: Vercel Pro/Hobby plan economics and build CPU rate. Pro is a $20/mo platform fee including one deploying seat and $20 usage credit; each additional deploying (Owner/Member) seat is $20/mo. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: build $0.0035 per CPU minute; Pro/Hobby usage units and overage model
Hobby free tier: 4 CPU-hours, 360 GB-hours, 1M function invocations/month
Pro plan: $20/mo platform fee, $20/mo per additional deploying seat, 1 TB Fast Data Transfer + 10M Edge Requests included
